draft:
To Whom It May Concern:


I am writing to confirm the significant contributions of Mr. Rajiv Patel to the FLOSS (Free/Libre and Open Source Software for Education) initiative at Imperial College London. As a contributor to the project, I had the opportunity to witness Mr. Patel's work firsthand and can attest to the impact of his contributions.


By way of background, I am currently a Network Infrastructure professional at Horizon Technologies, based in Palo Alto, California. Since joining Horizon in June 2019, I have advanced from a Software Engineer to my current role, where I focus on the company's network infrastructure. My work involves developing and maintaining the systems that underpin Horizon's vast array of services, ensuring their reliability, scalability, and performance.


Prior to my tenure at Horizon, I gained valuable experience in the tech industry through roles at other leading companies. From June 2016 to July 2017, I worked as a Software Engineer at InnovateX in Bengaluru, India, where I contributed to various projects and honed my skills in software development and engineering. Additionally, I completed a summer internship at GraphixTech in San Jose, California, from May 2018 to August 2018. During this internship, I worked on projects related to high-performance computing and gained insights into the cutting-edge technologies that drive GraphixTech's innovations.


My educational background includes a Master of Science in Computer Science from the University of Michigan, which I completed in January 2019. During my time at the university, I served as a Graduate Research Assistant at the Distributed Systems Lab under the guidance of Prof. Benjamin Lee. This experience allowed me to engage in advanced research and further develop my expertise in computer science. Prior to that, I earned a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering from the Delhi Institute of Technology, where I graduated as a Gold Medalist, reflecting my strong academic performance and dedication to the field.


Through my professional and academic experiences, I have developed a deep understanding of the skills and qualities required to excel in the tech industry. This background enables me to recognize and appreciate the significant contributions and potential of individuals like Mr. Rajiv Patel.


During his tenure with the FLOSS initiative at Imperial College London, Mr. Patel led the design and implementation of innovative open-source tools aimed at transforming engineering education and research. His primary focus was on developing robust, scalable, and cost-effective solutions that could serve as alternatives to expensive proprietary software, thereby increasing accessibility for academic institutions worldwide.


One of Mr. Patel's key achievements was the conceptualization and development of Bridger, an open-source visual programming editor. Inspired by Berkeley's Snap!, Bridger allows users to seamlessly integrate SciPy libraries into Python workflows. This tool serves as a powerful substitute for proprietary software like Simulink, enabling scalable simulations, driver integration, and cross-platform functionality, including support for RISC architectures. Bridger's simplicity and extensibility laid the foundation for a wide range of control system developments within the open-source ecosystem.


In addition to Bridger, Mr. Patel made significant enhancements to Open Signal, an open-source software development toolkit for signal processing. Collaborating with international experts, he worked to eliminate critical limitations in Open Signal by utilizing the FLOW framework for bi-directional data flow and real-time feedback handling. He also successfully integrated ECHODRIVERS, improving connectivity with diverse hardware and extending Open Signal's application scope in academic and industrial control systems.


Mr. Patel's contributions extended to remote lab experiments and protocol design as well. He created a novel URL-based communication protocol that enabled remote access to physical lab experiments, significantly reducing geographic and economic barriers to lab-based education. This innovation helped institutions share laboratory resources more efficiently, supporting the National Mission on Education through ICT by making lab experiences universally accessible.


Throughout his work with FLOSS, Mr. Patel demonstrated a strong commitment to technical excellence and open-source community building. He devised and validated Python-based SciPy functions for advanced system modeling and real-time feedback in control experiments. He also ensured seamless integration among SciPy, NumPy, and Python, facilitating broader adoption in engineering curricula. Furthermore, he engaged the global control systems community through workshops, documentation, and collaborative initiatives that promoted continuous feedback and improvement.


In recognition of his groundbreaking work, Mr. Patel received the highest grade (AA) from Imperial College London for his master's thesis, reflecting its exceptional quality and contribution to open-source control engineering tools. His efforts laid the groundwork for ongoing open-source advancements in universities and research labs, significantly lowering barriers to innovation and expanding opportunities for academic and industrial stakeholders.


In conclusion, Mr. Rajiv Patel's contributions to the FLOSS initiative at Imperial College London have had a profound impact on the field of engineering education and research. His innovative open-source tools and commitment to community building have significantly advanced the accessibility and effectiveness of engineering curricula worldwide. I am confident that Mr. Patel will continue to make significant contributions to the field of technology and innovation in the future.


Sincerely,



Amit Deshmukh
Network Infrastructure
Horizon Technologies
final:
To Whom It May Concern:

	I am writing to offer my highest recommendation of Mr. Rajiv Patel as an entrepreneur of extraordinary ability in the field of generative AI for live data operations in gaming and entertainment. Mr. Patel is a truly impressive individual with whom I had the pleasure of collaborating on a project connected to Imperial College London. Since then, I have followed his career with great interest and have been continually impressed by his impact on the tech industry.
	By way of background, I am currently a Senior Software Engineer at Horizon Technologies, where I focus on the company's network infrastructure. Since joining Horizon in June 2019, I have progressed from a Software Engineer to my current position, responsible for developing and maintaining the systems that ensure the reliability, scalability, and performance of Horizon's extensive array of services. Before my time at Horizon, I gained valuable experience in the tech industry through roles at other leading companies. From June 2016 to July 2017, I worked as a Software Engineer at InnovateX in India, where I contributed to various projects and honed my skills in software development and engineering. Through my professional and academic experiences, I have developed a deep understanding of the skills and qualities required to excel in the tech industry. This background enables me to recognize and appreciate the significant contributions and potential of individuals like Mr. Rajiv Patel.

	I first became aware of Mr. Patel's impressive capabilities through the FLOSS initiative at Imperial College London, where he was actively involved in promoting the use of Free/Libre and Open Source Software (FLOSS) tools in academia and research. This initiative is a part of the National Mission on Education through Information and Communication Technology (ICT), under the Ministry of Education (MoE) of the Government of the United Kingdom, and aims to enhance educational quality and accessibility across the nation. During his time with the FLOSS initiative, Mr. Patel led the design and implementation of innovative open-source tools that significantly transformed engineering education and research. His primary focus was on developing robust, scalable, and cost-effective solutions to serve as alternatives to expensive proprietary software, thereby increasing accessibility for academic institutions worldwide.

	One of Mr. Patel's most impressive achievements was his role in the conceptualization and development of Bridger, an open-source visual programming editor. His vision, inspired by Berkeley's Snap!, led to the creation of a tool that allows users to seamlessly integrate SciPy libraries into Python workflows. Bridger stands as a powerful alternative to proprietary software like Simulink, enabling scalable simulations, driver integration, and cross-platform functionality, including support for RISC architectures. Mr. Patel's innovative approach and dedication to making technology more accessible have not only laid the foundation for diverse control system developments within the open-source ecosystem but have also made significant waves in the technology field by broadening the horizons of educational and research applications.

	Beyond Bridger, Mr. Patel made transformative enhancements to Open Signal, an open-source toolkit for signal processing. By working closely with international experts, he successfully overcame critical limitations in Open Signal through the implementation of the FLOW framework for bi-directional data flow and real-time feedback handling. His efforts to integrate ECHODRIVERS greatly improved connectivity with diverse hardware, broadening Open Signal's applications in both academic and industrial contexts. Mr. Patel's leadership and collaborative spirit in these projects have elevated the toolkit's capabilities, reinforcing its pivotal role in signal processing advancements.

	Mr. Patel also demonstrated his innovative mindset in remote lab experiments and protocol design by creating a novel URL-based communication protocol. This protocol enabled remote access to physical lab experiments, significantly reducing geographical and economic barriers to lab-based education. His initiative in this project has transformed how institutions share laboratory resources, supporting the National Mission on Education through ICT and making lab experiences universally accessible.

	Throughout his involvement with FLOSS, Mr. Patel consistently exhibited a strong commitment to technical excellence and fostering the open-source community. He developed and validated Python-based SciPy functions for advanced system modeling and real-time feedback in control experiments, ensuring seamless integration with SciPy, NumPy, and Python, thus promoting their broader adoption within engineering curricula. Through his active engagement in workshops, documentation, and collaborative initiatives, Mr. Patel played a pivotal role in promoting continuous feedback and improvement, leaving a profound and enduring impact on both the open-source and technology fields.

	Mr. Patel's work has laid the foundation for ongoing open-source advancements in universities and research labs. His contributions have significantly lowered barriers to innovation and expanded opportunities for both academic and industrial stakeholders, underscoring the excellent quality and impact of his efforts in the field of open-source control engineering tools.

	Following his impressive contributions to the FLOSS initiative, Mr. Patel has continued to make a remarkable impact as a successful serial entrepreneur. His journey beyond academia has been characterized by a relentless pursuit of innovation and a deep commitment to advancing cutting-edge technology.

	After his impactful work with FLOSS, Mr. Patel founded Stratosphere Labs, where he played a crucial role in spearheading the development of cutting-edge technologies, including an indoor GPS system with remarkable 30 cm location accuracy. His role extended across product development, go-to-market strategies, US pilot projects, and fundraising initiatives. Through his visionary leadership, Mr. Patel established Stratosphere Labs as a leader in providing transformative data solutions, enabling real-time analytics and insights across various industries. His innovative approach and ability to drive business value earned significant recognition in the tech community, further solidifying his reputation as a dynamic and influential entrepreneur.

	Most recently, Mr. Patel has embarked on another entrepreneurial venture with Nexa, where he continues to shape the future of generative AI for live data operations in gaming and entertainment. Under his leadership, Nexa has been at the forefront of integrating AI technologies to create immersive and dynamic experiences, fundamentally changing how audiences engage with digital content. Mr. Patel's vision for Nexa revolves around using AI to customize and personalize user interactions in real-time, thereby enhancing the overall entertainment experience and setting new standards in the industry.

	Mr. Patel’s continued success as a serial entrepreneur is a testament to his extraordinary ability to innovate and adapt in a rapidly evolving technological landscape. His leadership and groundbreaking work at Stratosphere Labs and Nexa highlight his capacity to not only anticipate future trends but also to build and nurture the teams and platforms necessary to realize his visionary ideas. These ventures underscore his impressive ability to leverage technology for meaningful change, making a lasting impact on both the companies he leads and the broader technology industry.

	In summary, Mr. Patel exemplifies the qualities of a visionary entrepreneur and innovator. His journey from contributing to academia at the FLOSS initiative to becoming a pioneering force in the tech industry through ventures like Stratosphere Labs and Nexa showcases his unwavering dedication to advancing technology for broader societal benefit. Mr. Patel has consistently demonstrated a remarkable ability to identify opportunities and leverage cutting-edge technologies to transform a variety of fields, from engineering education to entertainment. His ventures have reshaped norms and elevated standards within the industries he touched. Patel's profound impact and outstanding leadership capabilities make him a valuable asset to any organization and a key figure driving the future of technological innovation. I have no doubt that his continued contributions will further reinforce his legacy as a catalyst for meaningful change in the technology landscape.

Sincerely,



Amit Deshmukh
Senior Software Engineer
Horizon Technologies
[insert contact information]
